name: run-me-on-files
description: Right-click selected files in the Explorer to run user-defined commands with the files as arguments.

runMe.templates.markdownDescription:
Run templates grouped by host. Top-level keys identify the environment (`local`, `ssh-remote:<host>`, `wsl:<distro>`, `dev-container`, `other`); each value is a list of templates available **only** on that host. Each template defines a shell command with `$1`, `$2`, … placeholders that get substituted with the absolute paths of files selected in the Explorer. A template is only offered when the number of selected files exactly equals the highest `$N` referenced in its command.

Example:
```json
"runMe.templates": {
  "local": [ { "name": "Open in VLC", "command": "vlc $1" } ],
  "ssh-remote:prod-1": [ { "name": "Tail log", "command": "tail -f $1" } ]
}
```

name.description: Display name shown in the picker.

command.markdownDescription: Shell command. Use `$1`, `$2`, … as placeholders for the selected files (in selection order). Example: `python run.py --file $1 --output $2`.

cwd.markdownDescription: Optional working directory. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`, `${fileDirname}` / `${fileDirname:1}` for the directory of `$1`, and `${fileDirname:2}` etc. for other selected files. Defaults to the workspace root.

commands.title: Run Me: Run on Selected Files…
Run Me: Open Templates in settings.json

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
